blended.narrative: Wildcat Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 7" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
